allow: PowerShell(& "d:\\projects\\scaffold\\.venv\\Scripts\\pip.exe" install ruff pytest pytest-qt --quiet; Write-Host "Exit: $LASTEXITCODE"; & "d:\\projects\\scaffold\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -m ruff --version)

PowerShell(cd d:\\projects\\scaffold; $env:PYTHONPATH = "."; Start-Process -FilePath ".venv\\Scripts\\pythonw.exe" -ArgumentList "main.py" -PassThru | Select-Object Id, ProcessName; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; Write-Output "App launched")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $proc = Get-Process -Id 9504 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($proc\) { Write-Output "Still running: $\($proc.Id\)"; Stop-Process -Id 9504 -Force } else { Write-Output "Process ended \(check for crash\)" })
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import PySide6.QtWidgets as w; import sys; app = w.QApplication\(sys.argv\); [print\(m\) for m in dir\(w.QStyle\) if m.startswith\('SP_'\)]")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from PySide6.QtWidgets import QStyle; print\([x for x in dir\(QStyle\) if 'SP_' in x][:20]\)")
